description: Executive actions, elections, and power struggles. These cards fire when the Imperator exists.

cards.title: The First Imperator Election
cards.description: The Imperator's office has been created. The Assembly must now elect the first holder. Who shall command the Bay?

choices.text: A Grange-haller — govern least, go home.
A Federalist — the law must be guarded.
A compromise candidate — neither faction's first choice.

cards.title: The Emergency Decree
cards.description: A crisis threatens the Bay. The Imperator may issue an emergency decree with the force of law for 90 days. Should they?

choices.text: Issue the decree. Act now, justify later.
Issue a limited decree with Assembly review in 30 days.

cards.title: The Succession Question
cards.description: The Imperator's term is ending. Should they seek a second term? The constitution may require a 2/3 vote.

choices.text: Step down. Honor the term limit.
Seek a second term. Call the vote.
Amend the constitution to allow unlimited terms.

cards.title: The Court Appointment
cards.description: A justice has died or retired. The Imperator must nominate a replacement. Who shall sit on the Codex Court?

choices.text: A loyalist who will support the Imperator.

cards.title: The Civilian Oversight Decision
cards.description: The Assembly proposes stripping the Praetorian Order of military command. The Imperator must sign or veto.

choices.text: Sign. The Order is civilian only.
Veto. The Order keeps the watch.
